title: Daily Briefing — Mar 31
headline: Extreme fear, tech breakdowns and energy strength: today's flows are screaming defensive, not chase.
body: Right, so let's look at what the flows are telling us. The big picture: market-wide breakdown below daily 20 MA on SPY ($662.08), QQQ ($593.17), and nearly all mega-cap tech—AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, XLK. Fear & Greed is rock-bottom at 13.2—full-on Extreme Fear. VIX is spiking above its 20 MA at 30.5, volatility regime confirmed. If you’re feeling nervous, so is everyone else.

Sector rotation shows Energy (XLE $61.95) remains elevated, but momentum is weakening and risk is increasing—don’t get greedy on late moves. Tech (XLK $127.50, RS 95.3) and Healthcare (XLV $143.82, RS 99.7) are leading laggards. Look for resilience in select energy names (AR, SM, OIH), but don’t chase—abundance mindset, next trade, not last trade. Financials (XLF $48.35) are still below their daily 20 MA ($49.56), canary hasn’t died but is wheezing.

Contrarian playbook: Extreme Fear is historically a 6-12 month buy zone, but don’t go full hero mode—wait for confirmation. Most tickers are below their daily 20 MA (R006), so per rules, trim aggressive exposure and stay defensive. If it’s in the press, it’s in the price—retail panic means it’s time to start your watchlist for mean reversion rallies, but don’t jump early. Patience, react, don’t predict.
callout_body:
SPY: $662.08 (20 MA) — watching for a close above to shift bias
QQQ: $593.17 (20 MA) — tech needs a reclaim
XLE: $61.95 (spot); $58.52 (20 MA), momentum peak
XLF: $49.56 (20 MA), $48.35 (current) — canary still in danger zone
VIX: 30.5 above SMA20 (25.82) — anticipate volatility spikes
XLK: $127.50 (price), $136.96 (20 MA) — if tech snaps back, watch for dark pool flows
action_items: Avoid new longs in mega-cap tech until daily closes reclaim 20 MA (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, XLK, QQQ)
Watch Energy momentum for signs of rollover; if XLE closes below 20 MA ($58.52), reduce exposure
closing_quote: Extreme fear is your friend, but only after the 20 MA says so. Patience, react, don’t predict.
